programme.desc: The Ethir Neechal family continues where it left off. Janani her cosisters are breaking down barriers to carve out their space in an exciting empowering journey as they strive to earn their familys understanding and protect relationships.

programme.title: Malli
programme.desc: Things take a momentous shift when a bold & loving village girl, Malli, crosses paths with a doting father and his 6-year-old daughter who yearns for a mother's love. Join the family's journey through the nuances of love, affection & parenthood.

programme.title: Iru Malargal
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends—Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi—tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: Puthu Vasantham
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family

programme.title: Movie Contd - Aravaan
programme.desc: Kombodhi is the leader of a tribe, who steals from the rich to survive. He befriends Varupuli, who unknown to Kombodhi is a man who escaped from being sacrificed and is being hunted by his village.

programme.title: Vaigai
programme.desc: A couple in love survive suicide attempts after the boy's father sends his henchmen to kill the girl. After their separation, he finds her again in the city but things do not work in their favour.

programme.title: Vaikarai Pookkal
programme.desc: Vellaisamy Gounder is a village chief who is in favour of casteism. He forbids the romantic relationship between Deivanai and the village doctor when the latter refuses to reveal his caste.

programme.title: Sivasakthi
programme.desc: Sakthi, a police officer, befriends Siva, a smuggler, in order to gain his trust and get evidence against him. But soon, their friendship turns into a genuine one.

programme.title: Pudhiya Mannargal
programme.desc: Sathyamurti, Vidya and four others are friends. When the CM kills one of them, Vidya witnesses it and goes to the police, for which she is raped. Unable to bear the humiliation, she commits suicide.

programme.title: Thoongathe thambi thoongathe
programme.desc: Desperate for work, an educated youth pretends to be a gardener. Later, he falls in love with his employer's daughter while his family wants him to marry someone else.

programme.title: Ragalai
programme.desc: Raj leads a carefree life and makes money by betting. When he desperately needs money to treat his father, he agrees to a bet of wooing Chaitra for a large sum. But then he learns a startling fact.

programme.title: Villan
programme.desc: Shiva, a bus conductor, robs from the corrupt in order to fund an organization that aids the disabled. He also pretends to be his own disabled twin in order to avoid detection and trial.

programme.title: Raam
programme.desc: A man is falsely charged for killing his mother. His neighbours are also called for interrogation. Everyone's effort leads to tracking down the real killer.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Raam
programme.desc: A man is falsely charged for killing his mother. His neighbours are also called for interrogation. Everyone's effort leads to tracking down the real killer.

programme.title: Vanjagan
programme.desc: A man dumps a bag while being chased by goons. A reporter finds it and learns about a murder plan of four important people. Two are already dead and she too gets kidnapped trying to save the others.

programme.title: Vavval Pasanga
programme.desc: A youngster is compelled to choose an unfavourable path because of societal pressure.

programme.title: Thiruthani
programme.desc: Velu, a gym instructor, refuses to help Duraipandi in his fight for social causes. Later, he changes his mind when he meets with an accident and learns that he is going to die soon.

programme.title: Sayra Narasimma Reddy
programme.desc: Ten years before the Sepoy Mutiny, Emperor Uyyalawada Narasimha Reddy of the Rayalaseema region fights the British East India Company in order to put an end to their atrocities.

programme.title: Nallavanukku Nallavan
programme.desc: Gangadharan, a kind man, reforms Manickam, a youngster, and eventually appoints him to be in charge of his business. Unhappy with his father's decision, Gangadharan's son picks a fight with Manickam.

programme.title: Veerappu
programme.desc: A mathematician wants his son to emulate him and master himself in mathematics. He keeps punishing his son as he is interested in physics, which leads him to become a rebel and later a gangster.

programme.title: Pokkiri
programme.desc: Tamizh, a hardcore criminal who does dirty jobs for money, falls in love with Sruthi, a charming girl, who hates his violent nature. Soon, a turn of events reveals his true purpose and identity.

programme.title: Guru En Aalu
programme.desc: A man, who wants his boss to help him set up his company, realizes that his boss has eyes on the girl he loves. To achieve his ambition, he decides to make a sacrifice and get his boss and his girlfriend together.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Guru En Aalu
programme.desc: A man, who wants his boss to help him set up his company, realizes that his boss has eyes on the girl he loves. To achieve his ambition, he decides to make a sacrifice and get his boss and his girlfriend together.

programme.title: Vegam
programme.desc: Sidharth and Daveed decide to get rich at any cost, hoping to lead a luxurious life, but they get into some unperceived danger and struggle to set things right.

programme.title: Veluthukattu
programme.desc: Kathir decides to change his wayward lifestyle to marry Arukkani and moves to the city. He returns home as a successful restaurant owner but tragedy strikes in Arukkani's life.

programme.title: Zombie
programme.desc: This story revolves around friend who plan to go on vacation after tired of their day-to-day life. Meanwhile, when they try to escape from that bored hectic life they get attacked by Zombie on their vacation and struggle a lot to save their life from the zombies and in this hush they meet Yashika.

programme.title: Arai Enn 305il Kadavul
programme.desc: Two men, who are extremely fed up with their work and non-existent love life, vent their frustration towards God. Affected by their words, He visits them along with a box of power.

programme.title: Bhagavathy
programme.desc: Bagavathi, a tea vendor, has big dreams for his younger brother, Guna. However, when Guna's girlfriend's father kills him, Bagavathi must fight to protect Guna's unborn child.

programme.title: Naai Sekar
programme.desc: Sekar's scientist neighbour is hell-bent on proving that it is possible to alter the DNA of animals & humans. So when Sekar is bit by a dog being experimented on, their traits get swapped. What happens next unfolds as a chaos of fun.

programme.title: Dharma Prabhu
programme.desc: Yama attempts to save an innocent child and accidentally rescues a corrupt politician along with her. Lord Shiva, who is furious about Yama's mistake, gives him an ultimatum to amend the situation.

programme.title: Kannukkul Nilavu
programme.desc: Gautham meets Dr Rajasekhar, a psychologist, to learn about his memories pertaining to a girl named Gayathri. Rajasekhar learns that he is looking for Shanmugam, who he thinks has killed Gayathri.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Kannukkul Nilavu
programme.desc: Gautham meets Dr Rajasekhar, a psychologist, to learn about his memories pertaining to a girl named Gayathri. Rajasekhar learns that he is looking for Shanmugam, who he thinks has killed Gayathri.

programme.title: Vinayaka
programme.desc: Karthik, a cheerful man, starts working for a new company in Hyderabad. There, he falls in love with Kalpana. Unfortunately, Kalpana doesn't feel the same for him.

programme.title: Virudhunagar Sandhippu
programme.desc: A fun loving student is raised by his college principal and falls in love with a girl, but the girl's father wants to take revenge on the principal who was responsible for putting him behind bars.

programme.title: Manasukkul Mathappu
programme.desc: A man is shattered and loses his sanity after the girl he loves dies. In the mental asylum, his doctor in charge falls in love with him. It remains to be seen if this will pull him out of his insanity.

programme.title: Kanden Seethaiyai
programme.desc: Surendra marries Savitri, an orphan. He meets with an accident and a huge amount is needed to undergo the operation, so Savitri decides to become a surrogate mother to earn money.

programme.title: Kai Kodukkum Kai
programme.desc: Veer marries a blind girl and is disowned by his brother. He rents a room and takes care of his wife. He decides to share the room with a handicapped youth who has a secret agenda of his own.

programme.title: Military
programme.desc: Madhavan is known as Military due to his strict attitude towards his five sisters. However, when he is forced to get his first sister married to a widowed professor, his other sisters alienate him.

programme.title: Guntur Kaaram
programme.desc: A man seeks explanations when his mother asks him to sign a document denying he is her son while she campaigns for office, years after she deserts him and marries again.

programme.title: Nenjinile
programme.desc: A man (Vijay) leaves his family for Mumbai to earn money for his sister's wedding; he becomes a hit man, but is forced to choose when the gang he works for wants to kill his girlfriend and her family.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Aravaan

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Bhairavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Bhairavi grows up to be a brave girl with abundant love and a divine grace. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal from the family?

programme.title: Moodu Mullu

programme.desc: A pure-hearted devotee of Lord Panduranga, Sakhu's unwavering faith & selflessness, draw her closer to the divine but also spark jealousy, leading to poverty, betrayal, & suffering. Yet, her unshaken faith proves the power of devotion, goodness & love.

programme.desc: Jealous of Officer Daya's success, his colleague Saleem plans his downfall. He joins hands with their corrupt commissioner and devises an evil plan to ruin him.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Shambavi

The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Mangalyaa
programme.desc: For Mayuri, family always comes first. For Tarak, bitterness towards his mother fuels every step. As their paths cross, love and revenge blur - witness the fate that binds Mayuri & Tarak together.

programme.title: Rathasapthami
programme.desc: Sapthami's selfless nature often leads her into trouble, while Sreemanth's self-serving actions strain his ties with his own family. Their contrasting worlds collide when destiny takes their paths from conflict to togetherness.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Kesarina Kamala
programme.desc: Movie starring Shrungar Nagaraj, Surekha, Kalpana and Uma Shivakumar and is directed by R N Jayagopal.

programme.title: Brahma Gantu
programme.desc: Muniyamma gets married to Murali, who hates her. Post marriage he falls in love with Julie and gets married to her. He brings Muniyamma to Julie's house and introduces her as a maid.

programme.title: Aryan
programme.desc: Aryan, a successful athlete-turned-coach, takes Shwetha under his wing, and moulds her into an ace athlete. However, things take a turn when she becomes successful.

programme.title: Thavarina Thottilu
programme.desc: Thimanna, a conniving man, gets his son, Bhaskar, married to Sarsu, the sister of a rich landlord. Soon, Thimanna starts taking money from Sarsu by lying, but fate punishes his family in a harsh way.

programme.title: Nee Bareda Kadambari
programme.desc: A couple get married to each other despite the initial disapproval of her parents. However, the woman's father, creates troubles and tries to separate them.

programme.title: Shabarimale Swamy Ayyappa
programme.desc: The childless king Rajasekhara Pandiyan finds an abandoned child in the forest and adopts him. The child grows up as a prince and is sent on a dangerous mission into the same forest.

programme.title: Ravivarma
programme.desc: Ravivarma is an artist with a special talent. His life turns upside down when he helps a police officer trace a notorious criminal through his artistic skills.

programme.title: Jwala Mohini
programme.desc: Movie starring Sampath, Ranga, Rajashree directed by S N Singh.

programme.title: Hosa Balu
programme.desc: MRT Music Kannada presents "Hosa Balu" Old Kannada Movie Songs Audio Jukebox. Sung by: K J Yesudas, Vani Jairam, Rajkumar Bharathi.

programme.title: Amar
programme.desc: Amar, a young man, falls in love with Bobby, a beautiful woman, when he meets her at a bike rally. However, Bobby's father fixes her marriage with Varun.

programme.title: Mane Maratakkide
programme.desc: After the demise of his parents, a Dubai-based man decides to sell their mansion. However, supernatural sightings and events prevent him from finding anyone who would be willing to buy the property.

programme.title: Anukoolakkobba Ganda
programme.desc: Radha, a wealthy girl, falls in love with Raja, a mechanic. Later, her father comes to know about their relationship and tries to separate the lovers.

programme.title: Thirupathi Express
programme.desc: Sumanth is travelling to Tirupati along with his family. He meets many extraordinary and interesting people on his journey who turn it into a memorable adventure.

programme.title: Mane Devru
programme.desc: A woman divorces her husband when he blurts out in a drunken stupor that he slept with a widow. He hatches a plan to reconcile with his family after failing to reason with her.

programme.title: Bhairava
programme.desc: Bhairava is an orphan who is speech-impaired and is being enslaved by Nanjegowda, a wealthy man. When a dark secret about Nanjegowda is let loose, Bhairava vows to take revenge against him.

programme.title: Kadina Veera
programme.desc: A drama film directed by Zahir Mubin, starring Poonam Chilnis and Vinod Alva in the lead roles.

programme.title: Kuridoddi Kurukshetra
programme.desc: Movie starring Sundar Krishna Urs, Sunder Raj, Arathi directed by B Vijay Gujjar.

programme.title: Jagath Kiladi
programme.desc: Despite being a police officer, Vijay is scared of goons, while Bhaskar, his lookalike, is a brave ex-convict. However, when their worlds collide, they discover a shocking truth.

programme.title: Mukunda Murari
programme.desc: Mukunda is an atheist whose life takes an ugly turn when an earthquake destroys his antique shop. He, however, does not give up hope and decides to sue God.

programme.title: Krishna Rukku
programme.desc: Krishna and Rukku are neighbours who grow up fighting over small things and are about to part ways by the time they realize they are made for each other.

programme.title: Annavara Makkalu
programme.desc: Triplets who were separated at the time of their birth learn about the loss of their beloved father and reunite to avenge his death.

programme.title: Bullet Basya
programme.desc: Bullet Basya, a playboy, falls in love with Kaveri but when Basya discovers that Kaveri loves Muthu, he kidnaps him and stages his death. Kaveri vows to take revenge from Basya.

programme.title: Samhara
programme.desc: Sri, a chef who is visually impaired, regains his vision following an accident. When he learns that his former lover is in trouble, he decides to come to her rescue.

programme.title: Thimmaraya
programme.desc: A village simpleton falls in love with his cousin, who is a city-bred girl. The girl dislikes him initially but later realises her folly.

programme.title: Raana
programme.desc: An aspiring cop Raana, awaiting his police documentation, is all set to marry his lover. The mysterious attack

programme.title: Minugu Thare
programme.desc: Movie starring Shruthi, Kumar Govind, Shweetha and directed by Shivamani.

programme.title: Madhuve Madu Tamashe Nodu
programme.desc: Ganesh arranges his sister Gauri's marriage but faces humiliation by her in-laws. His misunderstanding with his childhood friend and neighbour, Raja, makes matters worse.

programme.title: Srikanta
programme.desc: Srikanta, who indulges in petty illegal activities, gives a lift to a journalist en-route to Agumbe. The duo talk about their life and experiences throughout their journey.

programme.title: Huli
programme.desc: An upright policeman stands tall against any and all criminals, including corrupt officials. When he goes up against a powerful minister with the help of a reporter, things quickly turn ugly.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: A politician slips into a coma after getting attacked by criminals. He wakes up after several years to find his son has taken up his responsibilities. However, things are not what they seem to be.

programme.title: Aderaga Adehaadui
programme.desc: Strange things happen when Chandu and Sangeetha decide to get married. To his horror, Chandu learns that they are being pursued and attacked by the ghost of Sangeetha's mother from her previous life.

programme.title: Mantra Saara
programme.desc: This program features various hymns showcasing several temples and their deities.

programme.title: Shabaas Bhola
programme.desc: With unshakable faith in Mahakal Shiva, little Bhola becomes the fearless defender of Kailashpur against Tantric Bhimani's dark and evil plans.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: This is an exclusive game show for women, where contestants can win cash prizes in various exciting games. Each episode's winner is rewarded with a grand cash prize of one lakh rupees. The show aims to help fulfill the dreams of women across Bengal.

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Sohage Adore
programme.desc: Surya marries his maid, Sohag, ruining his mother’s plans for an affluent match. As tensions rise, Sohag faces hostility from all sides. Surya’s devotion to her lights the way for their journey of love and healing in a broken family.

programme.title: Roopmati
programme.desc: Roopnagar's princess Roopmoti is the jewel of her people. Cast into exile, she finds herself guided by unseen powers & bound to a destiny greater than the crown she lost. Watch her rise to protect her kingdom from the dark forces of evil.

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama. Rajasekhar, a rich, influential man and his son Arun, live in a palatial home together with their extended family. Nandini, an Ichchadhaari Nagam”, (shapeshifting snake) awaits to avenge Rajasekhar’s past misdeed and regain the three ‘Kalachakram’ .

programme.title: Julali Gaath Ga
programme.desc: Social media influencer Saavi takes a bold stance against injustice & stays true to her values, honoring her grandfather's legacy while battling the ruthless rogue Dhairya. Join Saavi on her journey of love & courage against betrayal & oppression.
